text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Erm.  No.  x11/gnome and all the myriads of GNOME applications in the 
ports tree build just fine thanks.  You've almost certainly got some 
weirdness going on with your system.  Indeed, I'm typing this on a little 
laptop, running GNOME fresh out of the oven today.
